telemetry.desc: By opting to send telemetry data, you can help us improve overall user experience of {{appName}}.
telemetry.title: Skicka Anonym Användningsdata

clear.confirm: Bekräfta to Rensa Alla Chatt data?
clear.desc: This kommer Rensa Alla session data, including Assistent, Filer, Meddelanden, plugins, etc.
clear.success: Alla session Meddelanden har been cleared
clear.title: Rensa Alla Session Meddelanden

reset.desc: Återställ Alla Inställningar to Standard values
reset.title: Återställ Alla Inställningar

errors.CONFLICT: Hotkey conflict: Denna hotkey is already assigned to another function
errors.INVALID_FORMAT: Invalid hotkey format: Please use correct format (e.g., CommandOrControl+E)
errors.NO_MODIFIER: Hotkey must include a modifier key (Ctrl, Alt, Shift, etc.)
errors.SYSTEM_OCCUPIED: Hotkey is occupied by system or another application

hotkey.invalidCombination: The hotkey must include at least one modifier key (Ctrl, Alt, Shift) och one regular key
hotkey.record: Tryck a key to record hotkey
hotkey.title: Hotkeys
hotkey.updateError: Misslyckades to Uppdatera hotkey: Network or system Fel

llm.aesGcm: Your keys och proxy address kommer be encrypted using <1>AES-GCM</1> encryption algorithm

checker.desc: Test if API-nyckel och proxy address är filled in correctly
checker.title: Connectivity Check

customModelCards.confirmDelete: You är about to Radera denna Anpassad Modell. Once deleted, it cannot be recovered. Please proceed med caution.

azureDeployName.extra: The field actually requested in Azure OpenAI
azureDeployName.placeholder: Ange Modell deployment Namn in Azure
azureDeployName.title: Modell Deployment Namn

displayName.placeholder: Ange display Namn of Modell, such as ChatGPT, GPT-4, etc.
displayName.title: Modell Display Namn

files.extra: The current Fil Ladda upp implementation is merely a hack solution och is intended for personal experimentation only. Please wait for a complete Fil Ladda upp capability in future updates.
files.title: Support Fil Ladda upp

functionCall.extra: This Konfiguration kommer only Aktivera function calling capabilities within application. Whether function calling is supported depends entirely on Modell itself; please test Modell's function calling capabilities on your own.
functionCall.title: Stöd för Funktionsanrop

id.extra: Will be displayed as Modell label
id.placeholder: Ange Modell ID, such as gpt-4-turbo-Förhandsvisning or claude-2.1
id.title: Modell ID

vision.extra: This Konfiguration kommer only Aktivera Bild Ladda upp capabilities within application. Whether recognition is supported depends entirely on Modell itself; please test Modell's visual recognition capabilities on your own.
vision.title: Stöd för Visuell Igenkänning

fetchOnClient.desc: Client-side Hämtar mode initiates session requests directly från browser, improving Svar speed.
fetchOnClient.title: Use Client-Side Hämtar Mode

modelList.desc: Välj models to display in session. The selected models kommer be displayed in Modell Lista.
modelList.placeholder: Please Välj a Modell från Lista
modelList.title: Modell Lista

proxyUrl.desc: Must include http(s):// in addition to Standard address
proxyUrl.title: API Proxy Address

llm.waitingForMore: Mer models är <1>planned to be added</1>, stay tuned

plugin.empty: Nej Installerad plugins yet, feel free to explore <1>Plugin Store</1>

settings.hint: Please fill in following configurations based on Beskrivning
settings.title: {{id}} Plugin Konfiguration

description.desc: A brief introduction to your Assistent, not for character setting
description.title: Assistent Beskrivning

tag.desc: Assistent tags kommer be displayed in Assistent marketplace
tag.title: Tag

animationMode.desc: Välj animation speed for application Svar actions
animationMode.title: Svar Animation

neutralColor.desc: Anpassad grayscale med different color tendencies
neutralColor.title: Neutral Color

noAnimation.desc: Inaktivera Alla animation effects in application
noAnimation.title: Nej Animation Mode

autoCreateTopicThreshold.desc: Automatically Skapa a topic when current Meddelande count exceeds denna value
autoCreateTopicThreshold.title: Meddelande Threshold

compressThreshold.desc: When uncompressed history Meddelanden exceed denna value, compression kommer be applied
compressThreshold.title: History Meddelande Length Compression Threshold

enableAutoCreateTopic.desc: Whether to automatically Skapa a topic during Konversation, only effective in temporary topics
enableAutoCreateTopic.title: Auto Skapa Topic

enableCompressHistory.title: Aktivera Automatic Sammanfattning of Chatt History

enableStreaming.desc: Aktivera streaming output to display responses in realtid. When Inaktiverad, only complete Svar is shown.
enableStreaming.title: Aktivera Streaming Output

historyCount.desc: Number of historical Meddelanden carried med each request
historyCount.title: Attached History Meddelande Count

inputTemplate.desc: The user's latest Meddelande kommer be filled into denna template
inputTemplate.placeholder: Preprocessing template {{text}} kommer be replaced med realtid input information
inputTemplate.title: Användarinmatningsförbehandling

none.desc: This depends on Modell's Svar output method; please test it yourself.

defaultCount.desc: Set Standard number of Bilder generated when creating a new task in Bild Generering panel.
defaultCount.label: Standard Bild Count
defaultCount.title: AI Drawing Inställningar

frequencyPenalty.desc: The higher value, Mer diverse och rich vocabulary; lower value, simpler och Mer straightforward language.
frequencyPenalty.title: Vocabulary Richness

maxTokens.desc: The maximum number of Tokens used for each interaction
maxTokens.title: Max Tokens Limit

presencePenalty.desc: The higher value, Mer inclined to use different expressions och avoid concept repetition; lower value, Mer inclined to use repeated concepts or narratives, resulting in Mer consistent expression.
presencePenalty.title: Uttrycksdivergence

reasoningEffort.desc: Higher values enhance reasoning ability but may increase Svar time och Token usage.
reasoningEffort.title: Reasoning Effort

temperature.desc: The higher value, Mer creative och imaginative responses; lower value, Mer rigorous responses.
temperature.title: Creativity Level
temperature.warning: If creativity level is set too high, output may become garbled.

topP.desc: How many possibilities to consider; a higher value accepts Mer potential answers, while a lower value tends to Välj most likely answer. It is not recommended to change denna alongside creativity level.
topP.title: Openness to Ideas

openingMessage.desc: The opening Meddelande displayed when Konversation starts, used to introduce Assistent's features
openingMessage.placeholder: Hello, Jag är your Anpassad Assistent. You can start chatting med me right away, or go to Assistent Inställningar to complete my information.
openingMessage.title: Opening Meddelande

openingQuestions.desc: Guiding questions displayed at beginning of Konversation
openingQuestions.title: Opening Questions

accessCode.desc: Encryption access is Aktiverad by administrator
accessCode.title: Access Password

signin.desc: Sign in using SSO to unlock app
signin.title: Logga In på Ditt Konto

showAllLocaleVoice.desc: If closed, only voices in current language kommer be displayed
showAllLocaleVoice.title: Visa Alla Locale Voices

sttAutoStop.desc: When closed, Tal recognition kommer not end automatically och requires manual Klicka to stop
sttAutoStop.title: Auto Stop Tal Recognition

sttLocale.desc: The language of Tal input, denna option can improve accuracy of Tal recognition
sttLocale.title: Tal Recognition Language

sttService.desc: Where 'browser' is native Tal recognition service of browser
sttService.title: Tal Recognition Service

ttsService.desc: If using OpenAI Text-to-Tal service, make sure OpenAI Modell service is Aktiverad
ttsService.title: Text-to-Tal Service

voice.desc: Välj a Röst for current Assistent, different TTS services support different voices
voice.title: Text-to-Tal Röst

exportType.all: Exportera Global Inställningar och Alla Assistent Data

submitAgentModal.metaMiss: Please complete Assistent information before submitting. It should include Namn, Beskrivning, och tags
submitAgentModal.placeholder: Ange a unique identifier for Assistent, e.g. web-development

deviceName.hint: Lägg till a Namn for easy identification
deviceName.title: Device Namn

warning.tip: After a long period of community testing, WebRTC synchronization may not reliably meet Allmän data synchronization needs. Please <1>deploy a signaling server</1> before use.

channelName.desc: WebRTC kommer use denna Namn to Skapa a sync channel. Ensure channel Namn is unique.
channelName.title: Sync Channel Namn

channelPassword.desc: Lägg till a password to ensure channel privacy. Only devices med correct password can join channel.
channelPassword.title: Synkroniseringskanallösenord

webrtc.desc: Real-time, peer-to-peer data communication requires Alla devices to be online for synchronization.

enabled.invalid: Please fill in signaling server och synchronization channel Namn before enabling.
enabled.title: Aktivera Sync

signaling.desc: WebRTC kommer use denna address for synchronization
signaling.title: Signaling Server

webrtc.title: WebRTC Sync

customPrompt.title: Anpassad Prompt

generationTopic.title: AI Art Automatisk Ämnesnamn
